component.name: Pipe Deck
component.summary: Linux audio mixer and PipeWire routing control center

description.p: Pipe Deck is an open-source Linux audio mixer for PipeWire. Route application audio to any output, adjust levels from one mixer panel, save setups as profiles, manage virtual devices, and automate routing with rules — without learning low-level PipeWire commands.
Keywords: Linux audio mixer, PipeWire mixer, audio routing, virtual devices, profiles.
